add-semi-transparent-logo-stamp-to-first.title: Add Semi-Transparent Logo Stamp to First PDF Page
add-semi-transparent-logo-stamp-to-first.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating an ImageStamp with reduced opacity, positioning it in the top‑right corner of the first page, and saving the result.

add-image-stamp-to-pdf-page.title: Add Image Stamp with Quality and Opacity to PDF Page
add-image-stamp-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating an ImageStamp, setting its quality to 100 % and opacity to 0.8, applying it to the second page, and saving the result.

add-image-stamp-alt-text-page-3.title: Add Image Stamp with Alt Text to PDF Page 3
add-image-stamp-alt-text-page-3.description: Shows how to place an image stamp with alternative text for accessibility on the third page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-background-floatingbox-page-4.title: Add Image Background to Page 4 Using FloatingBox
add-image-background-floatingbox-page-4.description: Shows how to place an image as the background of a FloatingBox that covers the entire fourth page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-image-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Apply Image Stamp to All PDF Pages
apply-image-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, create an ImageStamp, add it to every page using a foreach loop, and save the stamped document.

rotate-image-stamp-45-degrees.title: Rotate Image Stamp 45° and Add to PDF
rotate-image-stamp-45-degrees.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating an ImageStamp, rotating it by 45 degrees, positioning it, and saving the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

align-image-stamp-top-right-margin.title: Align Image Stamp to Top‑Right Corner with Margins
align-image-stamp-top-right-margin.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp to a PDF and align it to the top‑right corner using margin offsets.

scale-image-stamp-full-page-width.title: Scale Image Stamp to Full Page Width
scale-image-stamp-full-page-width.description: Shows how to add an image stamp to every page of a PDF and scale it to the page width while preserving the original aspect ratio using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-from-memory-stream.title: Add Image Stamp from Memory Stream to PDF
add-image-stamp-from-memory-stream.description: Demonstrates how to create an ImageStamp from a MemoryStream and apply it to each page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-low-quality-image-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Low-Quality Image Stamp to PDF
add-low-quality-image-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp with reduced quality (10 %) to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, improving performance for large documents.

add-opaque-image-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Fully Opaque Image Stamp to PDF
add-opaque-image-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, create an ImageStamp with full opacity, and apply it as a watermark to every page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-diagonal-image-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add Diagonal Image Watermark to PDF
add-diagonal-image-watermark-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to apply an image stamp rotated 90° as a diagonal watermark on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-upside-down-image-stamp.title: Add Upside-Down Image Stamp to PDF Page
add-upside-down-image-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to place an image stamp on a PDF page and rotate it 180° so it appears upside‑down using Aspose.Pdf.

place-image-stamp-custom-coordinates.title: Place Image Stamp at Custom Coordinates in PDF
place-image-stamp-custom-coordinates.description: Shows how to add an image stamp to a PDF page at specific X and Y positions using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-with-percentage-offsets.title: Add Image Stamp with Percentage Positioning
add-image-stamp-with-percentage-offsets.description: Demonstrates how to place an image stamp on each page of a PDF using percentage‑based offsets relative to the page width and height.

fit-image-stamp-into-rectangle.title: Fit Image Stamp Within a PDF Rectangle
fit-image-stamp-into-rectangle.description: Shows how to add an image stamp to a PDF page and automatically fit it inside a defined rectangle while preserving its aspect ratio using Aspose.Pdf.

add-fixed-size-image-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Fixed-Size Image Stamp to PDF Pages
add-fixed-size-image-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to place a PNG image stamp with constant width and height on every page of a PDF, ignoring page size variations, using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-with-unicode-alt-text.title: Add Image Stamp with Unicode Alternative Text
add-image-stamp-with-unicode-alt-text.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp to a PDF and set multilingual Unicode alternative text for accessibility using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-alt-text-pdfa1b.title: Add Image Stamp with Alt Text for PDF/A‑1b Output
add-image-stamp-alt-text-pdfa1b.description: Shows how to add an image stamp with alternative text only when creating a PDF/A‑1b document and then convert the PDF to PDF/A‑1b compliance using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-to-encrypted-pdf.title: Add Image Stamp to Encrypted PDF
add-image-stamp-to-encrypted-pdf.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF with a password, decrypt it, apply an image stamp to every page, and then re‑encrypt the document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-to-signed-pdf.title: Add Image Stamp to Signed PDF without Invalidating Signature
add-image-stamp-to-signed-pdf.description: Shows how to load a digitally signed PDF, place an image stamp on a page, and save the document using an incremental update so the existing signature remains valid.

add-image-stamp-to-pdf-preserving-annota.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF While Preserving Annotations
add-image-stamp-to-pdf-preserving-annota.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating an ImageStamp, positioning it, and adding it to a page without affecting existing annotations, then saving the result.

add-image-stamp-to-pdf-form.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF Form While Preserving Fields
add-image-stamp-to-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with form fields, creating an ImageStamp, positioning it, and applying it to each page while keeping the form fields interactive.

add-image-stamp-flatten-annotations.title: Add Image Stamp and Flatten Annotations to Create Read‑Only PDF
add-image-stamp-flatten-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp to every page of a PDF and then flatten all annotations so the resulting document becomes read‑only.

add-image-stamp-preserve-bookmarks.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF While Preserving Bookmarks
add-image-stamp-preserve-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, creating an ImageStamp, applying it to every page, and saving the document while keeping all bookmarks and the outline intact.

add-image-stamp-preserve-page-labels.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF While Preserving Page Labels
add-image-stamp-preserve-page-labels.description: Demonstrates how to add a semi‑transparent image stamp to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and keep existing page labels unchanged.

add-image-stamp-preserve-xmp-metadata.title: Add Image Stamp and Preserve XMP Metadata in PDF
add-image-stamp-preserve-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to place an image stamp on every page of a PDF while retaining the original XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-preserve-embedded-files.title: Add Image Stamp and Preserve Embedded Files
add-image-stamp-preserve-embedded-files.description: Loads a PDF containing embedded files, adds an image stamp to each page, and saves the document while keeping the original embedded attachments intact.

add-image-stamp-preserve-javascript.title: Add Image Stamp While Preserving JavaScript Actions
add-image-stamp-preserve-javascript.description: Shows how to place an image stamp on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf without removing existing JavaScript actions.

add-image-stamp-preserve-acroform-fields.title: Add Image Stamp While Preserving AcroForm Fields
add-image-stamp-preserve-acroform-fields.description: Demonstrates how to place a semi‑transparent image stamp on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while keeping existing AcroForm fields intact.

add-custom-text-stamp-to-first-pdf-page.title: Add Custom Text Stamp to First PDF Page
add-custom-text-stamp-to-first-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to create a text stamp with a specific font, size, and blue color, and apply it to the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-auto-adjusting-text-stamp.title: Add Auto‑Adjusting Text Stamp to PDF
add-auto-adjusting-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to place a text stamp on each page of a PDF and automatically adjust its font size to fit a defined rectangle using Aspose.Pdf.

add-outlined-text-stamp.title: Add Outlined Text Stamp to PDF
add-outlined-text-stamp.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a centered TextStamp with custom font, size, and color, add it to a page, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-bold-outlined-text-stamp.title: Add Bold Outlined Text Stamp to PDF
add-bold-outlined-text-stamp.description: Shows how to place a TextStamp with fill‑stroke rendering to create bold outlined text on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-bottom-left-text-stamp.title: Add Bottom‑Left Text Stamp with Margin to PDF
add-bottom-left-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, creating a TextStamp, aligning it to the bottom‑left corner with a 10‑point margin, applying it to each page, and saving the result.

add-slanted-text-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add Slanted Text Watermark to PDF
add-slanted-text-watermark-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a TextStamp, rotate it 30 degrees, set opacity and alignment, and apply it as a watermark to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-confidential-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Confidential Text Stamp to PDF Pages
add-confidential-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, creating a semi‑transparent "CONFIDENTIAL" TextStamp, centering it on each page, and saving the modified document.

add-text-stamp-with-background-box.title: Add Text Stamp with Background Box to PDF
add-text-stamp-with-background-box.description: Demonstrates how to add a semi‑transparent text stamp with a colored background box to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-multi-line-disclaimer-text-stamp.title: Add Multi-Line Disclaimer Text Stamp with Custom Line Spacing
add-multi-line-disclaimer-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates creating a TextStamp with custom line spacing and applying it to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rtl-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add RTL Text Stamp to PDF
add-rtl-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a right‑to‑left language TextStamp (Arabic/Hebrew), configuring its appearance, and applying it to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-full-page-image-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add Full-Page Image Watermark to PDF
add-full-page-image-watermark-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to apply an image stamp as a semi‑transparent background watermark that covers the entire page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-diagonal-text-stamp-watermark.title: Add Diagonal Text Stamp Watermark to PDF
add-diagonal-text-stamp-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to apply a semi‑transparent, 45° rotated text stamp as a diagonal watermark on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-background-image-stamp-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Background Image Stamp to PDF Pages
add-background-image-stamp-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to place an image stamp behind the content of each page in a PDF by setting the Background property to true.

add-image-stamp-with-opacity-to-pdf-page.title: Add Image Stamp with Opacity to PDF Pages
add-image-stamp-with-opacity-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi‑transparent image stamp on every page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rotated-image-stamp-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Rotated Image Stamp to PDF Pages
add-rotated-image-stamp-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to place an image stamp rotated 90 degrees on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-custom-sized-page-stamp.title: Add Custom-Sized Page Stamp to PDF
add-custom-sized-page-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to create a page stamp from another PDF, set custom width, height, and position, and apply it to a specific page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-page-stamp-to-specific-pdf-pages.title: Add Page Stamp to Specific PDF Pages
add-page-stamp-to-specific-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to create a PdfPageStamp from a source page and apply it to pages 5 through 10 of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Add Text Stamp to All PDF Pages
add-text-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to create a TextStamp and apply it to every page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-page-stamp-from-template-page.title: Create PDF Page Stamp from Template Page
create-pdf-page-stamp-from-template-page.description: Shows how to build an in‑memory PDF page as a stamp template and apply that stamp to each page of another PDF document.

use-pdf-page-as-background-stamp.title: Use PDF Page as Background Stamp
use-pdf-page-as-background-stamp.description: Shows how to apply a page from another PDF as a semi‑transparent background stamp to every page of a target PDF document.
